title: onobrychis biebersteinii
intro: Onobrychis biebersteinii, also known as Persian clover or fenugreek, is a legume plant native to the steppes of Central Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis biebersteinii include reducing blood sugar levels, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for medicinal purposes, and is also used in herbal remedies to support women's health and reduce menstrual cramps.
